eas_text: A civil authority has issued A LOCAL AREA EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Potter, TX; at 07:36 PM ON MAY 17, 2026 Effective until 08:36 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Amarillo Area Office of Emergency Management: Lifted Evacuation from Two Deer Trail, Bishop Estates, Quail Canyon. You can return and follow directions from emergency personnel. Roads may be blocked or congested, so plan your route accordingly. Visit SOCIAL MEDIA for updates. Stay informed via local news or official channels.
